headline: Is Aon’s Stablecoin Premium Deal Quietly Reframing Coinbase’s Role in Real-World Payments Infrastructure (COIN)?
summary: Aon plc recently completed what it describes as the first stablecoin insurance premium payments among major global brokers, using U.S. dollar-backed stablecoins like USDC on Ethereum and PayPal USD on Solana to settle premiums for clients including Coinbase and Paxos. This move highlights Coinbase’s growing role in regulated stablecoin infrastructure, as insurance payments begin to use the same blockchain rails that underpin its stablecoin and payments business. We’ll now examine how this...
